nodes.x: Now these are the generations of the sons of Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth: and unto them were sons born after the flood.
These are the families of the sons of Noah, after their generations, in their nations: and by these were the nations divided in the earth after the flood.
And Noah begat three sons, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
¶ And the sons of Noah, that went forth of the ark, were Shem, and Ham, and Japheth: and Ham is the father of Canaan.
And Noah and his sons hearkened unto the Lord, and gave heed, and they were called the sons of God.
These are the three sons of Noah: and of them was the whole earth overspread.
The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
¶ The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
¶ And the sons of Naphtali; Jahzeel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shillem.
The sons of Reuel; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
And the sons of Gomer; Ashkenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.
And the sons of Gomer; Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.
And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
And the sons of Uzziel; Mishael, and Elzaphan, and Zithri.
And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
¶ The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
By these were the isles of the Gentiles divided in their lands; every one after his tongue, after their families, in their nations.
These are the sons of Shem, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, after their nations.
And it came to pass that I looked and beheld many waters; and they divided the Gentiles from the seed of my brethren.
And I beheld that their mother Gentiles were gathered together upon the waters, and upon the land also, to battle against them.
¶ And when they were gone over, they came into the land of Gennesaret.
Now those descendants were as numerous, nearly, as were the Nephites; and thus the Nephites were obliged to contend with their brethren, even unto bloodshed.
¶ And the sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, and Phut, and Canaan.
¶ The sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
¶ And the sons of Simeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman.
¶ And the sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah, and Pharez, and Zerah: but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. And the sons of Pharez were Hezron and Hamul.
The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,
And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be a mighty one in the earth.
And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be mighty upon the earth.
He was a mighty hunter before the Lord: wherefore it is said, Even as Nimrod the mighty hunter before the Lord.

2. Now it was Nimrod who excited them to such an affront and contempt of
God. He was the grandson of Ham, the son of Noah, a bold man, and of
great strength of hand. He persuaded them not to ascribe it to God, as
if it was through his means they were happy, but to believe that it was
their own courage which procured that happiness. He also gradually
changed the government into tyranny, seeing no…
And Kish was the son of Corom.

He was a mighty hunter before the Lord: wherefore it is said, Even as Nimrod the mighty hunter before the Lord.
And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be a mighty one in the earth.
And he exerciseth all the power of the first beast before him, and causeth the earth and them which dwell therein to worship the first beast, whose deadly wound was healed.
And the beginning of his kingdom was Babel, and Erech, and Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.
And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Ir-shemesh,
And it came to pass in the days of Amraphel king of Shinar, Arioch king of Ellasar, Chedorlaomer king of Elam, and Tidal king of nations;
And he was king in Jeshurun, when the heads of the people and the tribes of Israel were gathered together.
¶ And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over the children of Israel.
And Ethem, being a descendant of Ahah, did obtain the kingdom; and he also did do that which was wicked in his days.
Out of that land went forth Asshur, and builded Nineveh, and the city Rehoboth, and Calah,
And Resen between Nineveh and Calah: the same is a great city.
¶ And Rehoboam dwelt in Jerusalem, and built cities for defence in Judah.
And all the people of the land rejoiced: and the city was quiet, after that they had slain Athaliah with the sword.

Nevertheless, they did find a land which had been peopled; yea, a land which was covered with dry bones; yea, a land which had been peopled and which had been destroyed; and they, having supposed it to be the land of Zarahemla, returned to the land of Nephi, having arrived in the borders of the land not many days before the coming of Ammon.
And all the people of the land rejoiced, and the city was in quiet: and they slew Athaliah with the sword beside the king’s house.
And Resen between Nineveh and Calah: the same is a great city.
Out of that land went forth Asshur, and builded Nineveh, and the city Rehoboth, and Calah,
And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:
And Humtah, and Kirjath-arba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:
Arise, go to Nineveh, that great city, and cry against it; for their wickedness is come up before me.
Arise, go unto Nineveh, that great city, and preach unto it the preaching that I bid thee.
And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,
And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.
And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
And Ozias begat Joatham; and Joatham begat Achaz; and Achaz begat Ezekias;
And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (out of whom came Philistim,) and Caphtorim.
And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (of whom came the Philistines,) and Caphthorim.
And Adoraim, and Lachish, and Azekah,
And of the sons of Pahath-moab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
And the Avims which dwelt in Hazerim, even unto Azzah, the Caphtorims, which came forth out of Caphtor, destroyed them, and dwelt in their stead.)
And of the sons of Bani; Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, and Ramoth.
¶ And Canaan begat Sidon his firstborn, and Heth,
And Canaan begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,
¶ And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.
¶ And the sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, and Phut, and Canaan.
And the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgasite,
The Jebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,
And the Amorites, and the Canaanites, and the Girgashites, and the Jebusites.
And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
And to the Canaanite on the east and on the west, and to the Amorite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Jebusite in the mountains, and to the Hivite under Hermon in the land of Mizpeh.
And they possessed all the coasts of the Amorites, from Arnon even unto Jabbok, and from the wilderness even unto Jordan.
And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,
And the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgasite,
Observe thou that which I command thee this day: behold, I drive out before thee the Amorite, and the Canaanite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Hivite, and the Jebusite.
And I will send an angel before thee; and I will drive out the Canaanite, the Amorite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite:
And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite: and afterward were the families of the Canaanites spread abroad.
Namely, five lords of the Philistines, and all the Canaanites, and the Sidonians, and the Hivites that dwelt in mount Lebanon, from mount Baal-hermon unto the entering in of Hamath.
¶ And they went up out of Egypt, and came into the land of Canaan unto Jacob their father,
And the border of the Canaanites was from Sidon, as thou comest to Gerar, unto Gaza; as thou goest, unto Sodom, and Gomorrah, and Admah, and Zeboim, even unto Lasha.
From the south, all the land of the Canaanites, and Mearah that is beside the Sidonians, unto Aphek, to the borders of the Amorites:
¶ And they came unto Jacob their father unto the land of Canaan, and told him all that befell unto them; saying,
¶ And Abram passed through the land unto the place of Sichem, unto the plain of Moreh. And the Canaanite was then in the land.
And king Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.
These are the sons of Ham, after their families, after their tongues, in their countries, and in their nations.
Now these are the generations of the sons of Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth: and unto them were sons born after the flood.
The ten sons of Haman the son of Hammedatha, the enemy of the Jews, slew they; but on the spoil laid they not their hand.
¶ Unto Shem also, the father of all the children of Eber, the brother of Japheth the elder, even to him were children born.
And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of one was Peleg; for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.
And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; because in his days the earth was divided: and his brother’s name was Joktan.
Also unto Shemaiah his son were sons born, that ruled throughout the house of their father: for they were mighty men of valour.
A. Unto Eber were born two sons; the name of one was Peleg, for in his days the earth was divided.
And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
The children of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram.
¶ The sons of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.
And the children of Aram; Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Mash.
And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And the children of Aram; Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Mash.
And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.
And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.
The children of Arah, six hundred fifty and two.
And Arphaxad begat Salah; and Salah begat Eber.
And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.
And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,
And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,
And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of one was Peleg; for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.
¶ Unto Shem also, the father of all the children of Eber, the brother of Japheth the elder, even to him were children born.
And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were the sons of Joktan.
And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,
And Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah,
Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,
And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,
And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,
And Parshandatha, and Dalphon, and Aspatha,
And Obal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,
And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were the sons of Joktan.
And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
And their dwelling was from Mesha, as thou goest unto Sephar a mount of the east.
And they passed thence unto mount Ephraim, and came unto the house of Micah.
And they dwelt therein, and have built thee a sanctuary therein for thy name, saying,
And the Horites in their mount Seir, unto El-paran, which is by the wilderness.
And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.
¶ And they came unto the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the half tribe of Manasseh, unto the land of Gilead, and they spake with them, saying,
These are the sons of Shem, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, after their nations.
These are the sons of Ham, after their families, after their tongues, in their countries, and in their nations.
For as many as are led by the Spirit of God, they are the sons of God.
And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
By these were the isles of the Gentiles divided in their lands; every one after his tongue, after their families, in their nations.
These are the families of the sons of Noah, after their generations, in their nations: and by these were the nations divided in the earth after the flood.
Genealogy of the Descendants of Shem: Noah and his Sons divide the Earth (viii. 1-30; cf. Gen. x.).
¶ And Noah went in, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons’ wives with him, into the ark, because of the waters of the flood.
